data.title: TLS Encryption
data.description: Netflix uses TLS to encrypt data in transit between users and the platform.
data.technical_spec: Implementation of Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocols to secure user sessions.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Robust defenses against distributed denial-of-service attacks ensure availability.
data.technical_spec: Employing AWS Shield and other anti-DDoS strategies to mitigate attack impact.

data.title: Visibility and Monitoring
data.description: Comprehensive monitoring and logging to detect and respond to security incidents.
data.technical_spec: Use of real-time analytics tools and logging services to track anomalies.

data.title: Access Control
data.description: Strict access management policies protect sensitive data and internal systems.
data.technical_spec: Implementation of role-based access control and multi-factor authentication.

data.title: Vulnerability Assessment
data.description: Routine vulnerability scans and penetration testing identify potential security gaps.
data.technical_spec: Use of automated tools and ethical hacking services to assess system security.
